name: Generic Sweden AB
summary: Generic Sweden AB provides consulting and telecommunication services in Sweden. The company's Consultancy division offers high-quality services to clients within the defense and civil security sector, as well as product development companies within the energy, telecommunications, transport/infrastructure, and medtech sectors. Its Telecom division acts as a specialized telecommunications operator that operates its own network for critical communication. This division offers its products and services within the Minicall and Messit product areas. Generic Sweden AB was founded in 1993 and is based in Stockholm, Sweden.
